name: FeatureItem

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: The icon slot rendered in the leading badge. Named IconContent (not Icon) so the Icon component can be used freely inside it — a parameter called Icon shadowed the component type, turning <Icon> into the slot rather than the icon (#300).

slots.description: The icon slot rendered in the leading badge. Named IconContent (not Icon) so the Icon component can be used freely inside it — a parameter called Icon shadowed the component type, turning <Icon> into the slot rather than the icon (#300).

mdSummary:
# FeatureItem

Feature Item component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Marketing
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/feature-item

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| FeatureItem | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| FeatureItem | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| FeatureItem | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The icon slot rendered in the leading badge. Named IconContent (not Icon) so the Icon component can be used freely inside it — a parameter called Icon shadowed the component type, turning <Icon> into the slot rather than the icon (#300). |
| FeatureItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| FeatureItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| FeatureItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `IconContent` (FeatureItem) — The icon slot rendered in the leading badge. Named IconContent (not Icon) so the Icon component can be used freely inside it — a parameter called Icon shadowed the component type, turning <Icon> into the slot rather than the icon (#300).
- `ChildContent` (FeatureItem) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<FeatureItem />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--radius`

## Files
